2167500.name: The Plague Doctor of Wippra - Artbook
2167500.description:
The Plague Doctor of Wippra - Artbook is a 34 pages PDF documenting the making of the game. It includes original game artwork, sketches, design notes and a behind the scenes video with insights into the development process.

The artbook and making of includes

  • 34 pages PDF in English
  • 34 pages PDF in German
  • 8 minute long video of behind the scene insights in English

Warning

The Artbook contains plot and puzzle-related spoilers. We recommend reading the Artbook after playing the game!
2167500.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
